sessionOrBearer.description: Preview placeholder for routes accepted by Chalk session auth or bearer/API-key auth.

MediaPlaneProviderConfig.description: Provider-specific properties are opaque to this API contract. The server's media-plane adapter for the named provider validates them, and secret values are redacted in API responses.

provider.description: Known values include cf_sfu and cf_rtk.
